rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the section claims 'training-free' / 'no routing-specific supervision' while describing supervised training on RouterBench labels).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (utility scores are presented as equally confident without marking confidence and missing evidence).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the headline result mixes two framings).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
